data.title: Add confidence signal parsing and double-failure routing to sprint SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description
Add confidence signal parsing and double-failure routing logic to the sprint SKILL.md. When implementation sub-agents emit UNCERTAIN twice for tasks under the same story, sprint routes the task to implementation-plan for re-planning.

## TDD Requirement
Eval RED test from task 18ce-5a1c must be written first. This task makes that eval test pass (GREEN).

## Implementation
Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md:

### Phase 5 Step 1 — Confidence Signal Parsing
After verifying sub-agent results, parse for CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signals:
1. For each sub-agent result, scan for CONFIDENT or UNCERTAIN:<reason> in the output
2. If UNCERTAIN found: record on the parent story via ticket comment: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <story-id> "UNCERTAIN_SIGNAL: task <id> — <reason>"
3. If CONFIDENT found: no action needed (proceed normally)

### Phase 5 — Double-Failure Detection (per story)
Before dispatching tasks in Phase 4, check UNCERTAIN count per story:
1. For each task about to be dispatched, get its parent story ID
2. Read story comments and count UNCERTAIN_SIGNAL entries for ANY task under that story (per-story tracking, not per-task)
3. If count >= 2: do NOT dispatch the task. Instead, route the story to implementation-plan for re-planning
4. Record: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "REPLAN_TRIGGER: failure — Story <id> had 2+ UNCERTAIN signals. Routing to implementation-plan."
5. After re-planning, record: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "REPLAN_RESOLVED: implementation-plan — Story <id> re-planned after confidence failures."

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains confidence signal parsing logic in Phase 5
  Verify: grep -q 'CONFIDENT\|UNCERTAIN' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md tracks UNCERTAIN count per story (not per task ID)
  Verify: grep -q 'per.story\|per story' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md records REPLAN_TRIGGER: failure on double-UNCERTAIN
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_TRIGGER: failure' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md records REPLAN_RESOLVED after re-planning
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_RESOLVED.*implementation-plan' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Sprint eval confidence signal test case passes (GREEN)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
